story.title: GPT-5.6 used a prompt to close a 30-year gap in convex optimization

draft:
GPT-5.6 just closed a 30-year gap in convex optimization with a single prompt. 
I'm intrigued by the implications of AI on mathematical research. 
This breakthrough shows AI can accelerate human discovery. 
What other unsolved problems will AI help us crack? 
#AIinMath #ConvexOptimization #MathematicalResearch
